name: danho-detailpage-maker-codex
description: Codex plugin for Korean e-commerce detail-page planning, text-first HTML publishing, and native image generation.

interface.shortDescription: Korean e-commerce detail pages in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Plan Korean e-commerce product detail pages, build static text-first HTML from PLANNING.md and DESIGN.md, generate image plans and prompts, create visuals through Codex native image generation, and replace sections while preventing duplicate copy.
defaultPrompt: v1 HTML 기준 image-plan과 네이티브 이미지 생성을 진행해줘
